Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
50 
OBESITY_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Obesity End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for obesity as of the end of the 
calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: OBESITY_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: OBESITY_MEDICARE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 =
